summary: This document is a Q&A response to an Innovate UK Endorsed (UKES) visa application addressing questions on IP, technology novelty, and team innovation. It highlights the platform's current deployment in Latin America and alignment with UK economic priorities while referencing academic studies on AI companionship. Several sections contain incomplete text placeholders, indicating the document was not fully finalized.
